sidebar_dashboard: Navigate to different sections of the app from here.
stats_leads: Track your total leads and new leads today.
stats_instances: Monitor your WhatsApp instances connection status.
token_balance: Your AI credit balance for language model requests.
recent_leads: View your most recent leads and their status.
leads_search: Search and filter your leads by name, phone, or status.
leads_table: View all your leads in one place. Click to view details.
leads_filters: Filter by qualification status, temperature, or treatment.
leads_actions: Bulk actions to qualify or update multiple leads at once.
instances_header: Connect and manage your WhatsApp instances here.
create_instance: Click here to connect a new WhatsApp number.
instance_card: Each card shows instance status. Click for QR code.
agents_create: Create AI agents to automate conversations.
agent_card: View and configure your AI agents here.
settings_nav: Manage your profile, password, and security settings.
